scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @zai/backend" "npm run dev -w @zai/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @zai/shared && npm run build -w @zai/backend && npm run build -w @zai/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @zai/shared && npm run typecheck -w @zai/backend && npm run typecheck -w @zai/frontend
